name: Chest CT With Contrast - Mediastinum
description: Chest CT with contrast focused on mediastinal evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the chest with intravenous contrast was performed from the lung apices through the adrenals.

sections.name: Mediastinal Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Mediastinal lymph nodes [are not pathologically enlarged / the largest node measures ___ cm short axis]. No mass or abnormal enhancement pattern.

sections.name: Aorta
sections.content: The thoracic aorta [is normal in caliber / no dissection or aneurysm / no intramural hematoma]. No abnormal enhancement.

sections.name: Pulmonary Arteries
sections.content: The main pulmonary artery [is normal in size / shows no filling defect / no pulmonary embolism]. Branch pulmonary arteries [are patent / no abnormality].

sections.name: Superior Vena Cava
sections.content: The SVC [is patent / shows no stenosis or thrombosis / is normal in contour].

sections.name: Esophagus
sections.content: The esophagus [is normal in caliber / shows no filling defect or mass]. Wall enhancement is [normal / not thickened].

sections.name: Thymus
sections.content: The thymus [is normal in appearance / shows no mass or abnormal enhancement]. No thymic lesion identified.

impression:
1. [No mediastinal mass or lymphadenopathy / Normal mediastinal contour].
2. [No evidence of pulmonary embolism / No acute finding].
3. [Recommend routine follow-up / No further workup recommended].
